federation_flow.authority_note: signals remain source-owned and cannot be rewritten by federation harvest
recurrence may be named only as a candidate pattern
candidate naming does not approve harvest or adoption
bounded verdicts are required before promotion claims
registry records lineage, merge, split, suppression, expiry, and consent posture
KAG receives derived candidates only after evidence, retention, and owner consent gates
ToS candidate dossier is an intake boundary, not a direct write
adoption returns through owner-local quests, not hidden injection

adoption_flow.authority_note: pattern receipt is not adoption approval
each owner decides whether the request fits its object class
owner consent is mandatory before durable adoption
compatibility checks precede projection and shadow runs
role and kind projection must remain explicit
shadow evidence is required before owner-local patching
decision may adopt, block, defer, quarantine, or request more evidence
patches are reviewable and local to the owning layer
assistant, agonic, routing, skill, technique, and runtime activation stays owner-approved and may still be blocked
every durable adoption needs rollback or explicit quarantine fallback
retention memory records lessons but does not prove claims

owner_split.owns: wave law, center stop-lines, and federation route
owner_split.must_not: absorb layer-owned proof, memory, routing, KAG, runtime, or ToS meaning
receive direct writes from harvest, KAG, runtime, or assistant surfaces

owner_split.owns: bounded harvest, lineage, owner-consent, boundary, and adoption verdicts
owner_split.must_not: execute adoption or own runtime activation
become proof or owner-local patch authority

owner_split.owns: derived harvest and adoption health summaries
thin harvest and adoption navigation signals
agent role and adoption posture contracts
owner_split.must_not: self-rewrite assistants or own runtime implementation

owner_split.owns: derived pattern candidates and downlink surfaces
owner_split.must_not: force owner uptake or replace source truth

owner_split.owns: skill adoption receipts and regression surfaces
technique adoption boundary and retention surfaces
owner_split.must_not: turn adoption notes into skill execution truth

owner_split.owns: storage, worker, event, and runtime record contracts
owner_split.must_not: treat seed landing as live runtime activation
